meta.purpose: Concept-first SFC macro ontology. The ontology is organized by economic objects and transformations: countries, sectors, stocks, flows, prices/rates/FX, ratios, identities, modifiers, and chart recipes. Data providers are leaf-level bindings under concepts only.
meta.organization_rule: Never organize this file by dataset, provider, API, database, or source. Sources answer how to populate a concept; they do not define the concept tree.
meta.single_concept_home: Each economic object lives in exactly one of stocks, flows, or prices_rates_fx. Growth rates, cross-country gaps, and other transforms are modifiers on that home concept (or a single derived ratio identity), not parallel primitives under another section.
meta.formula_modifier_calls: In ratio formula strings, modifier(concept_id) denotes the pipeline applying that modifier to the canonical concept (e.g. yoy(real_gdp_local_chained)). Names align with modifiers.stock_flow_modifiers keys unless a ratio-only modifier is documented for ratio concepts.

FC_OFIs.label: Other financial institutions and non-bank financial intermediaries

change.definition: Arithmetic change over a configured window.

acceleration.definition: Change in the previous change or growth rate.

real.definition: Nominal value deflated by the concept-specific deflator.

share_world.definition: Country value divided by world aggregate.

share_region.definition: Country value divided by regional aggregate.

currency_converted.definition: Local-currency value converted to target currency.

change.definition: Point change in ratio value over a configured window.

zscore.definition: Standardized ratio relative to its own history or cross-section.

instrument_denomination.formula: dimension identifies contract or claim denomination, not aggregation currency

hh_total_financial_assets.definition: Financial assets held by households and NPISH.

hh_equity_holdings.definition: Direct and indirect household equity holdings.

hh_nonfinancial_assets.definition: Household real estate, durables, and other nonfinancial assets.

hh_real_estate.definition: Household residential real estate at market value.

hh_consumer_durables.definition: Household vehicles, appliances, furniture, and other durables.

hh_net_worth.definition: Household total assets minus total liabilities.

hh_net_financial_wealth.definition: Household financial assets minus liabilities, excluding real estate.

nfc_outstanding_debt.definition: Loans, bonds, and commercial paper owed by NFCs.

nfc_loans_outstanding.definition: Bank and non-bank loans outstanding to NFCs.

nfc_debt_securities_liability.definition: Corporate bonds and commercial paper outstanding.

nfc_listed_equity.definition: Market capitalization of listed non-financial corporations.

fc_loans_assets.definition: Loans held as assets by banks.

fc_reserves_at_central_bank.definition: Bank reserves held at the central bank.

gg_held_by_public_debt.definition: Government debt held by the public, net of intragovernmental holdings.

gg_nonfinancial_assets.definition: Public non-financial assets such as infrastructure and land.

iip_assets.definition: Foreign assets owned by domestic residents.

iip_liabilities.definition: Domestic assets owned by foreign residents.

central_bank_holdings_of_govt_debt.definition: Central bank holdings of government debt.

m3.definition: Broad money aggregate M3 where reported.

total_domestic_debt.definition: HH + NFC + FC + GG domestic debt.

total_credit_to_nfcs_bis.definition: BIS total credit to the non-financial sector.

bank_credit_to_nfcs_bis.definition: BIS bank credit to private/non-financial sector where available.

fc_banks_international_claims.definition: International claims in locational or consolidated banking statistics.

fc_banks_foreign_claims_immediate.definition: Consolidated foreign claims on immediate-counterparty basis.

fc_banks_foreign_claims_guarantor.definition: Consolidated foreign claims on guarantor / ultimate-risk basis.

bis.quirk: CBS_BASIS=U uses L_POSITION=C rather than I.

global_liquidity_credit_usd.definition: BIS global USD liquidity credit to selected borrower sectors/regions.

international_debt_securities_outstandin.definition: International debt securities outstanding by issuer residence/nationality/business/currency.

nfc_net_worth.definition: Non-financial corporate sector net worth (assets minus liabilities).

nfc_intangible_assets.definition: Non-financial corporate intangible assets including intellectual property and goodwill.

nfc_tangible_and_intangible_assets.definition: Published aggregate of NFC tangible and intangible assets when reported jointly, or constructible sum for Tobin q variants.

fc_repo_assets.definition: Financial corporation securities resale or repo claims (cash lending collateralized by securities).

fc_repo_liabilities.definition: Financial corporation repo or securities borrowing liabilities.

fc_money_market_fund_shares.definition: Money market fund shares or units outstanding (liability of MMFs, asset of holders).

gg_short_term_debt_outstanding.definition: General government debt due within one year or short-term instruments such as bills.

gg_long_term_debt_outstanding.definition: General government long-term debt excluding short-dated bills when separately reported.

population_total.definition: Total resident population level; source units typically persons or thousands of persons as published.

population_working_age.definition: Working-age population per national definition; source units typically persons or thousands of persons as published.

employment_headcount.definition: Total employment or filled jobs headcount as published by labor accounts.

labor_force_headcount.definition: Labor force (employed plus unemployed seeking work) headcount.

unemployment_headcount.definition: Unemployed persons under labor-force survey definition.

dwelling_count_residential.definition: Stock of residential dwellings or housing units.

capital_stock_net_fixed_volume.definition: Net fixed capital stock in volume terms or constant prices from perpetual inventory or national balance sheet.

central_bank_other_deferred_assets.definition: Central bank other assets including deferred-asset positions arising from QE-related losses when capturable.

nominal_gdp_local.definition: Headline nominal GDP in local currency.

real_gdp_local_chained.definition: Real GDP in chained-volume or constant-price terms.

government_consumption_G.definition: Government consumption and gross investment in GDP accounting.

nl_government.definition: Government net lending; fiscal balance sign convention.

nl_rest_of_world.definition: Rest-of-world net lending against domestic economy.

portfolio_inflows.definition: Portfolio inflows into equity and debt.

net_interest_income.definition: Bank interest received minus interest paid.

capital_account_balance.definition: Balance on the capital account excluding the financial account.

balance_of_payments_errors_omissions.definition: Net errors and omissions closing the balance of payments.

revaluation_hh.definition: Total household holding gains and other nominal revaluation flows affecting net worth, excluding transactions captured in saving and residential investment.

hh_revaluation_financial_assets.definition: Holding gains and other revaluation on household financial assets.

hh_revaluation_real_estate.definition: Holding gains and other revaluation on household residential real estate.

hh_ocva_financial_assets.definition: Other changes in volume of household financial assets not due to transactions or price revaluation.

nfc_revaluation_total.definition: Aggregate holding gains and revaluation on NFC assets and liabilities from national financial accounts.

nfc_ocva_total.definition: Other changes in volume for the NFC sector balance sheet.

fc_revaluation_total.definition: Aggregate holding gains and revaluation on financial corporation balance sheets.

fc_ocva_total.definition: Other changes in volume for the financial corporation sector.

gg_revaluation_debt_securities.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on general government debt securities outstanding.

gg_ocva_total.definition: Other changes in volume for the general government sector.

row_iip_revaluation_net.definition: Net international investment position revaluation from price and exchange-rate changes.

row_iip_ocva_net.definition: Net other changes in volume for international investment position assets and liabilities.

gross_national_saving.definition: Gross national saving from national accounts.

nfc_corporate_profits_after_tax.definition: Non-financial corporate profits after tax and valuation adjustments, NIPA or SNA-consistent where available.

nfc_property_income_net.definition: NFC net property income (interest, distributed income, rent) received minus paid.

nfc_equity_issuance_gross.definition: Gross equity issuance by non-financial corporations from financial accounts.

nfc_net_equity_issuance.definition: Net equity issued by non-financial corporations after buybacks and other retirements; national financial accounts aggregate.

hh_debt_service_payments.definition: Household debt service including interest and required principal as published for DSR statistics.

cb_net_income.definition: Central bank net income before distribution and remittances to government.

cb_remittances_to_government.definition: Central bank profits remitted or distributed to the general government.

cb_revaluation_of_holdings.definition: Holding gains and revaluation flows on central bank assets and liabilities from national financial accounts.

aggregate_hours_worked.definition: Total hours worked in the economy over the period (or index thereof).

hh_revaluation_equity_securities.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on household holdings of listed and unlisted equity.

hh_revaluation_debt_securities_holdings.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on household debt security positions.

hh_revaluation_investment_funds_shares.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on household investment fund shares excluding direct equity when separately reported.

hh_revaluation_other_financial_assets.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on other household financial assets not classified as equity, debt securities, or fund shares.

nfc_revaluation_equity_securities.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on NFC listed and unlisted equity positions.

nfc_revaluation_debt_securities_holdings.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on NFC debt securities held as assets.

nfc_revaluation_tangible_nonfinancial_as.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on NFC tangible non-financial assets including inventories when price-driven.

fc_revaluation_equity_securities.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on financial corporation equity security holdings.

fc_revaluation_debt_securities_holdings.definition: Holding gains and revaluation on financial corporation debt security holdings.

manufacturing_or_industrial_output_volum.definition: Industrial or manufacturing production in volume terms.

fdi_outflows.definition: Foreign direct investment outflows by resident investors.

policy_rate_effective.definition: Effective overnight policy rate or local equivalent.

secured_overnight_rate.definition: Secured overnight risk-free rate such as SOFR.

real_yield_curve_tips.definition: Inflation-linked or real sovereign yield by tenor.

breakeven_inflation_curve.definition: Nominal minus real sovereign yield by tenor.

fx_spot_bilateral.definition: Local currency per USD or configured bilateral spot rate.

wage_index_ahc.definition: Average hourly earnings or similar wage index.

inflation_expectation_or_core_inflation.definition: Expected or core inflation rate used to form ex-ante real policy and market rates.

investment_grade_corporate_spread.definition: Investment-grade corporate bond yield spread over comparable-maturity government debt.

nominal_interest_rate.definition: Benchmark nominal long-term government yield used for fiscal r-g and equity risk premium scaffolding; align to sovereign 10Y when available.

corporate_bond_total_return_index.definition: Investment-grade or aggregate corporate bond total return index.

equity_implied_volatility_index.definition: Implied volatility index for broad local equity market.

reit_index_level.definition: Listed real estate or REIT price index.

forward_earnings_yield_equity_market.definition: Forward-looking earnings yield for broad equity market (inverse of forward P/E).

employment_cost_index.definition: Employment cost index or equivalent measure of labor compensation per unit labor.

consumer_rent_price_index.definition: Consumer price index rent of primary residence or equivalent tenant rent sub-index.

central_bank_income_and_revaluation.formula: cb_net_income distributes via cb_remittances_to_government with cb_revaluation_of_holdings in flow of funds

sectoral_balance_deck.description: SFC net-lending deck for one country.

leverage_heatmap.description: Leverage ratios across countries with levels, changes, and acceleration.

cross_border_claims_map.description: Reporter-counterparty BIS claims map expressed as FC bank stock concepts.

flow_of_funds_identity_check.fx_conversion_required: if residual is computed from levels across currencies

population_contract.concept_first_rule: PRISM and local scripts must traverse stocks, flows, prices_rates_fx, ratios, identities, and chart_recipes. They must not traverse provider datasets as ontology roots.

bis_here.note: BIS mappings are intentionally leaf metadata under SFC concepts.

haver_for_prism.where_to_fill: source_bindings.haver under each stock, flow, price/rate/FX concept, or ratio component. Provider series that are transforms of a flow (e.g. headline GDP YoY) attach as the modifier realization on that flow, not as a separate prices_rates_fx concept.
